title: Registering Authority for registering Cable television networks
description: Registering Authority for registering Cable television networks
text: REGD. NO. D.L.-33004/94 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-Section (ii) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 496] NEW DELHI, THURSDAY, SEPTEMBER 29, 1994/ASVINA 7, 1916 2239 GI/94 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETIE OP INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PAST II—Sue 3(il)] MINISTRY OF INFORMATION AND BROADCASTING NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 29th September, 1994 S.O. 718(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by clause (h) of section 2 of the Cable Television Networks (Regulation) Ordinance 1994, the Central Government hereby notifies the Head Post Master of a Head Post Office, of Jhe area within whose territorial jurisdiction the office of the Cable Operator is situated, as the Registering Authority for registering Cable television networks in the said area for the purposes of the said Ordinance. [F. No. 9|7|93-PBC Vol.11] NAVIN CHAWLA, Jt. Secy. Printed by the Manager, Govt. of India Press, Ring Road, Maya Puri, New Delhi-110064 •nd Published by the Controller ol Publication*.
